metadata.description: Skills and hooks for the eAgent platform covering coding, office, system, intelligence, devops, quality, frontend, API, testing, and workflow automation. Designed to complement eMCP local MCP servers.

plugins.name: eskill-coding
plugins.description: Git workflows, code review preparation, test scaffolding, refactoring, dependency auditing, API mapping, database migrations, performance analysis, and branch management.

plugins.name: eskill-office
plugins.description: Document-to-markdown conversion, data pipelines, architecture diagrams from code, report building, presentation extraction, and spreadsheet validation.

plugins.name: eskill-system
plugins.description: Environment validation, Docker container dashboards, log investigation, system snapshots, backup workflows, and process analysis.

plugins.name: eskill-intelligence
plugins.description: Codebase cartography, knowledge graph construction, research workflows, decision frameworks, context export, and learning navigation.

plugins.name: eskill-devops
plugins.description: CI/CD configuration generation, infrastructure review, deployment checklists, release workflows, and monitoring configuration.

plugins.name: eskill-quality
plugins.description: Security vulnerability scanning, license compliance checking, code standards enforcement, configuration auditing, file integrity verification, and accessibility scanning.

plugins.name: eskill-meta
plugins.description: Project scaffolding, changelog maintenance, session recaps, project health dashboards, and issue decomposition.

plugins.name: eskill-frontend
plugins.description: Frontend auditing for performance, accessibility, design system compliance, responsive design, CSS quality, and component architecture.

plugins.name: eskill-api
plugins.description: API compatibility checking, versioning strategy, schema validation, documentation generation, endpoint testing, and contract verification.

plugins.name: eskill-testing
plugins.description: Test strategy design, coverage analysis, test generation, mutation testing, quality gates, and test infrastructure management.
